title: Concept Note Template
description: Use before an activity to lay out the background, objectives, target participants, methodology, and expected outcomes.

title: Event Schedule Template
description: Use before a multi-day training or workshop to plan sessions, timing, and facilitators day by day.

title: Event Reporting Template
description: Use after any training, distribution, or field activity to record background, attendance, target vs. achievement, and sign-off.

title: Attendance Sheet Template
description: Annex to the Event Reporting Template — record who attended, sex, role, organization, and photo consent for a standard field activity.

title: Attendance Sheet — Camp
description: Same as the standard attendance sheet, adapted for camp settings — records Progress ID instead of organization.

title: Master Roll Template — Camp
description: Use for material distributions at camp level — list the item(s) and quantity distributed, then record each participant's receipt.

title: Master Roll Template — Common
description: Same as the Camp version, for distributions outside camp settings — records Designation and Organization instead.

title: Participant List — Camp
description: Register participants expected or enrolled for a camp-level activity before it takes place.

title: Participant List — Common
description: Same as the Camp version, for activities outside camp settings — records Designation and Organization instead.

title: Case Story Template
description: For documenting an individual beneficiary's experience in narrative form, with built-in guiding questions.

title: Success Story Template
description: For write-ups of notable project outcomes, with built-in guiding questions, for donor or public communication.

title: Guidance
description: How to gather, write, and get consent for a case story or success story.

subcategory: Complaint, Feedback and Response Mechanism (CFRM) Template
title: Complaint, Feedback and Response Mechanism (CFRM) Template
description: For logging and tracking complaints or feedback received from participants and communities.

title: Field Observation Reporting Template
description: For recording direct observations during a field or monitoring visit.

title: Incident Reporting Template
description: Annexure A3 — report an actual or suspected incident of child abuse or sexual exploitation and abuse (SEA).

title: General Incident Report
description: For any incident other than safeguarding or PSEA — security, accident or injury, fire, natural disaster, theft, vehicle accident, or property damage.

title: Consent Form Template
description: Annexure A3 — consent for using a person's photo, video, words, or story in FIVDB communications.

title: PowerPoint Presentation Template
description: Branded slide template for trainings, workshops, and donor presentations.

subcategory: Guidance of Documentation and Folder Creation
title: Guidance of Documentation and Folder Creation
description: How to file, name, and store project documents and activity folders so they stay easy to find.
